name: Hilton Grand Vacations Inc.
sic_description: Hotels, Rooming Houses, Camps & Other Lodging Places
summary: Hilton Grand Vacations Inc. (HGV) is a vacation ownership company operating under the Hilton brand. The company develops, markets, sells, and manages vacation ownership resorts and related products and services. HGV also provides financing to customers purchasing vacation ownership interests and manages a points-based exchange and rental program for its members.
